title: Unsuspicious
body:
**Unsuspicious** is a resource pack made for the new suspicious sand/gravel blocks in 1.20. For the suspicious sand, this resource pack adds a orange border. For the suspicious gravel, there is a blue border. These borders help players distinguish normal sand/gravel from the suspicious kind.

 

**I hope you enjoy this resource pack and free free to leave any suggestions in the comments!**
